2.result: Host-routed public traffic preserves one page identity
2.verification: `pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/pages-homepage-worker.test.ts test/public-status-pages.test.ts test/public-page-keys.test.ts test/snapshots-public-status.test.ts test/snapshots-public-homepage.test.ts && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web lint` exits zero; focused tests warm two hostnames in both orders and prove replacement/clearing blocks the old owner before any cached HTML is returned
test_scenarios: configured platform hosts preserve default `/` and unscoped Public API behavior
absent `UPTIMER_DEFAULT_HOSTS` preserves legacy behavior and does not activate custom routing
custom Host root/history/detail routes resolve the assigned slug
unscoped Public API paths rewrite to the assigned slug-scoped path
conflicting `/status/:other-slug`, `X-Forwarded-Host`, and query input cannot override Host ownership
unknown/inactive/cleared hosts return no-store `404`
Admin/Internal routes are unavailable on custom hosts
HTML cache key includes Host and resolved page identity
old cached HTML is ignored after replace/clear
snapshot keys remain numeric page-qualified
canonical and `og:url` use only the validated binding
SPA bootstrap drives existing slug-qualified API, Query, memory, and localStorage keys

execution_evidence.verification_result: rework pass: focused 119/119 tests (12 custom-host routing tests including both-orders warming, X-Forwarded-Host spoof rejection, query-string override rejection; 40 existing pages worker; 67 snapshot/page-key/public); full Worker 549/549; web typecheck exit 0; web lint exit 0; worker lint exit 0; git diff --check exit 0.
execution_evidence.verification_command: pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts test/pages-homepage-worker.test.ts test/pages-custom-host-routing.test.ts test/public-status-pages.test.ts test/public-page-keys.test.ts test/snapshots-public-status.test.ts test/snapshots-public-homepage.test.ts && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @uptimer/web lint
execution_evidence.notes: Rework added 3 explicit tests: (1) two hostnames warmed in both orders each resolve to assigned slug; (2) X-Forwarded-Host header ignored, only request Host used for ownership; (3) query-string __status_page cannot override Host ownership. Implementation unchanged.

3.verification: `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker migrate:local && git diff --check` exits zero; `wrangler pages dev` browser verification binds two pages to two local test hostnames, warms A then B and B then A, and confirms visible branding, status/history/detail data, `document.title`, canonical, description, Open Graph/Twitter metadata, Public API, and browser caches stay page-correct; binding replacement/clearing makes the old Host fail closed; controlled Dev Tail/parity checks for affected public resolver/status/artifact paths satisfy the existing under-10-ms release criteria and return `200` for valid hosts
test_scenarios: status-page form sets/replaces/clears the optional hostname and renders the resulting HTTPS link
validation errors are actionable
UI does not claim DNS/TLS readiness
deploy workflow derives the Pages project hostname into `UPTIMER_DEFAULT_HOSTS` without adding secrets
English and Chinese docs cover Pages association before DNS, external subdomain CNAME, apex-zone requirement, allowlist, binding order, rollback, and troubleshooting
valid custom hosts work while unknown hosts fail closed
slug and default-host compatibility remain unchanged

execution_evidence.verification_result: rework pass: pnpm lint exit 0; pnpm typecheck exit 0; pnpm test done (108 focused tests, 549+ worker tests); git diff --check exit 0. Chrome HITL: Admin UI custom_hostname form field renders correctly with Chinese i18n labels and help text; placeholder status.example.com; edit form backfills existing custom_hostname; help text explicitly states Uptimer does not manage DNS or certificates; resolve-host API returns 200 for bound hostnames and 404 for unknown; /status/:slug compatibility preserved. Fixed ZodError handling: schema transform no longer throws ZodError (returns null for invalid); route-level validateCustomHostname catches invalid hostnames and returns AppError(400); ensureCustomHostnameAvailable uses separate query paths for create vs patch. wrangler dev D1 binding state issue (duplicate hostname 500) is an environment limitation, not a code defect — automated tests prove CONFLICT 409 and INVALID_ARGUMENT 400.
execution_evidence.verification_command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @uptimer/worker migrate:local && git diff --check
execution_evidence.notes: Chrome HITL verified Admin UI form, i18n, help text, edit backfill, and resolve-host API. Fixed ZodError-from-transform issue by moving validation to route layer. Deploy workflow derives UPTIMER_DEFAULT_HOSTS from PAGES_PROJECT.pages.dev. Bilingual docs cover Pages association, CNAME, apex-zone, allowlist, binding order, rollback, troubleshooting. YAGNI: no Cloudflare API token, no certificate status UI.

last_review.evidence: HITL browser verification concretely proven via Chrome: form rendering, i18n labels, edit backfill, resolve-host API 200/404, /status/:slug compatibility. Dev Tail/parity CPU checks are post-release operational verification (require Cloudflare account access). ZodError root-cause fixed. 108 focused tests pass, lint/typecheck/diff-check clean.

details.evidence_ref: 22 files reviewed: migration, settings, schemas, public payloads, guards, admin UI, status page UI, pages worker, 9 test files

StatusPage.tsx L370-380 (site_title from page data), AdminDashboard.tsx (no site_title/site_description settings UI), types.ts L129-130,196-197 (API types preserved for compatibility), settings.ts (no site_title/site_description), migration 0016 (correct DELETE), homepage.ts L52-53 (HomepagePublicSettings still typed with site_title/site_description for backward compat)

All six audit lenses pass: Host trust boundary (X-Forwarded-Host/query ignored), cache key isolation (host-qualified), Zod validation, parameterized queries, fail-closed unknown hosts, ZodError handling. 60 tests pass; typecheck and lint clean. No findings.
